text.style: font-size: 7.1px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #546e7a

g.text: The figure describes the estimator internals only: one shared temporal representation feeds two classification heads and one regression head.
